# markdown-to-gcal


Create Google Calendar events from structured markdown files using MCP.



## Triggers

- markdown to gcal

- create calendar event

- schedule event




## What I do

- Convert a structured markdown file into a Google Calendar event

- Parse event metadata (title, start, end, timezone, attendees)

- Create or update events in Google Calendar via MCP




## Usage examples

- Use the markdown-to-gcal skill with this file

- Create a Google Calendar event from this markdown

- Schedule this event from the markdown file
